summary_markdown: Essential workflows supporting integrated health and care delivery across all settings.

activities.objectives: Ensure accurate patient identification and demographic information for safe care delivery
activities.personas: General Practitioner, District Nurse, Care Home Manager
activities.title: Patient Registration and Demographic Update

activities.objectives: Ensure medication safety through comprehensive review and accurate reconciliation
activities.title: Medication Review and Reconciliation

activities.objectives: Create person-centred care plans addressing individual goals and support needs
activities.personas: Social Worker, Occupational Therapist, Mental Health Nurse, Patient/Service User
activities.title: Care Plan Development and Review

activities.objectives: Rapid access to critical information for emergency care decisions
activities.title: Emergency Response Coordination

activities.objectives: Safe and timely discharge with appropriate support arrangements
activities.personas: Hospital Consultant, Social Worker, Care Home Manager, District Nurse
activities.title: Discharge Planning and Coordination
